Title: The CCEE’s service in the dynamism between unity and diversity
Content: Hosted by the Spanish Bishops’ Conference, the meeting of the General Secretaries took place in Madrid from 16 to 19 June 2024. The meeting, entitled: the CCEE’s service in the dynamism between unity and diversity, saw the participation of 30 General Secretaries of the Bishops’ Conferences. After the opening greetings and the presentation of the new General Secretaries, participants were offered three reports starting from the Synod on Synodality. Msgr. Gabriel Richi Alberti, Dean of the Faculty of Theology at the University of San Dámaso, addressed the topic of Bishops’ Conferences as synodal expressions; Synodality as an ecumenical experience was the theme treated by Sr. Estelle Mical Sogbou of the Chemin Neuf Community in Bonn, Germany; Rev. Martin Michalíček, CCEE General Secretary, recounted his experience of six years in the service of the CCEE. A striking element was the Holy Mass celebrated in the Hispano-Mozarabic Rite at Toledo Cathedral.
